description: An HTML document that provides the front-end user interface for a database visualizer application, including styling, layout, and embedded JavaScript for dynamic interactions with a backend API.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of available databases from the backend API and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Handles the refresh button click to reload the list of databases and reset the UI.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses the list of tables for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches and displays tables for the selected database.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Retrieves and displays data for a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs the HTML table with data retrieved from the backend.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Creates individual table cells, handling nulls, objects, and long strings with expandable content.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses the cell content to show full data for long strings or objects.
